access_path: portable repository snapshot and release-profile bundle
appeal_path: request human maintainer review through a repository issue
challenged_party_independence: portable export metadata is retained in the repository and release logs
preservation_rule: preserve exit artifacts even when reader prose is curated
preservation_obligation: retain reader manifest and release blockers with the release bundle
non_claims: fixture does not prove institutional exit rights
fixture does not prove runtime portability
fixture does not prove legal rights
fixture does not promote support states
